entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @Jyotika_Bhatia welcome to SAP Community. Great chance to live some time in Switzerland. To extend your network there, I would like to recommend to check the Location Groups we have in Switzerland: St. Gallen and Zurich. This is the link to all European Groups: https://community.sap.com/t5/europe/ct-p/europe

Enjoy your stay in Europe.

entry.title: Re: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content:
Hello,

this certification is now possible 
https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-reporting-modelling-and-data-acquisition-with-sap-bw-4hana

entry.title: Re: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content:
You can try something like that to force OPCH

with DATA AS
(
SELECT
T8.DocEntry AS OPCHDocEntry
, T8.DocNum AS OPCHDocNum,
T2.DocNum,
--T7a.[U_AF_MAJORGRP]
--, T7a.[U_AF_OVERGRP],
T7b.ItmsGrpNam,
T7.ItemCode, T7.Dscription,
T7.Quantity, T7a.InvntryUom, T8.DocDate, T8.DocDueDate,
T8.CardCode, T8.CardName, T7.Price
--T6.DocNum,
--T10.DocNum
FROM POR1 T1
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPOR T2
ON T1.DocEntry = T2.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PDN1 T3
ON T2.DocEntry = T3.BaseEntry
AND T1.LineNum = T3.BaseLine
AND T1.ItemCode = T3.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPDN T4 ON T3.DocEntry = T4.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPD1 T5 ON T4.DocEntry = T5.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T5.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T5.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPD T6 ON T5.DocEntry = T6.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PCH1 T7 ON T4.DocEntry = T7.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T7.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPCH T8 ON T7.DocEntry = T8.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T7a ON T7.[ItemCode] = T7a.[ItemCode]
INNER JOIN OITB T7b ON T7a.[ItmsGrpCod] = T7b.[ItmsGrpCod]
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPC1 T9 ON T8.DocEntry = T9.BaseEntry AND T7.LineNum = T9.BaseLine AND T7.ItemCode = T9.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPC T10 ON T9.DocEntry = T10.DocEntry

WHERE
T8.[DocDate] >='20240601' and T8.[DocDate] <='20240610'
--ORDER BY

--T2.DocNum,
--T1.LineNum,
--T4.DocNum,
--T3.LineNum,
--T6.DocNum,
--T5.LineNum,
--T8.DocNum
--T7.LineNum,
--T10.DocNum,
--T9.LineNum
)
SELECT
OPCH.DocEntry
,OPCH.DocNum
,DATA.*
FROM
OPCH
INNER JOIN Data On DATA.OPCHDocEntry = OPCH.DocEntry

FOR BROWSE

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Welcome to all new members.

@Çınar : I would like to recommend a location group for you in Turkey: the Istanbul Group. I know it's quite far away from Ankara, but it's always good to connect with some locals. They are organizing regular community events, which you might want to attend some time. @barisguler is managing the group. Check it out and connect with others!

Do you have any ideas on how to handle this?

Dear Akhil, could you post your question directly in MDG. That would be great. The application might run in SAP Business Client, but for the methods and classes you have to ask the application team.

Kind Regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello @clombardo welcome to SAP Community. If you want to connect with others in North America, I can recommend to check out the Location Groups there: https://community.sap.com/t5/americas/ct-p/americas.

Great opportunity to connect with other local community members, as there are oftentimes events happening. Maybe you find it interesting.

entry.title: CDS output to 3rd party
entry.content:
I used the standard CDS as underlying  CDS . we want the output of it to be send as e-mail to 3rd party


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CDS output to 3rd party
entry.content: Published Custom CDS view or a custom Analytical Queries(built on top of Custom CDS view) do not have the capability to run by itself and then email it to the specified Target audience

entry.title: Why does the weight unit field automatically assign the value of KG when expanding the sales view?
entry.content: Why does the weight unit field automatically assign the value of KG when expanding the sales view?

entry.title: Re: How to set up public dimension for 2 company codes
entry.content: Alternatively, you can add the company code description as a property on the profit center. The property can be shown as a single column/bar in the table or chart.

entry.title: Re: DRF Custom ABAP BAdI Filter Implementation
entry.content:
Dear Gabor,

To begin with I would like to thank because you have published the blog around custom filter. I am also having similar kind of requirement please help me to get answer of following queries.

1. Can we filter the complete BP in ECC to follow this blog?  As we are not on S/4 and we need to  restrict the complete BP to be replicated to target system .  In your blog you mentioned S/4.

2. I have created custom class and all config is done. My breakpoint is not getting trigger . 

Any suggestion ?

 

Regards,

Rahul Khandelwal

entry.title: Re: Business Object Service Entry Sheet for Lean Services

Hi,

If you want to know more about API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV, you can refer to API Business Hub https://hub.sap.com/api/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/overview for more detailed content. Hope it helps.

Best Regards and Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content: Got it! Thanks ~

entry.title: Re: Error message not preventing users to submit the chan...
entry.content:
Hello @akhil_lal,

 

My recommendation is to not implement the check in your custom feeder class but to use one of the options offered by the MDG Framework to define quality checks and rules.

Depending on the release of your system, you have multiple possibilities:

  • Data Quality Management (DQM) - introduced with MDG on S/4HANA 1809; you can find several blogs (for example, this one) explaining in detail the functionalities;
  • BRF+ - no-code approach; here you can find a step-by-step guide for this
  • Code the rule in ABAP using the BAdI USMD_RULE_SERVICE - more details in this guide.

I hope this helps,

R.

entry.title: Re: Error in ABAP CDS View for annotation @Analytics.query: true
entry.content: Is it worked after adding @analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE annotation?

entry.title: Inquiry about SSL certificates
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to ask for some advice regarding SSL certificates 

 

One of our clients currently using SAP B1 9.3 PL14 SQL version has raised a security issue with their current server SSL certification version.(SQL Version: SQL Server 2016 SP3 + GDR_13.0.6435.1) 

 

They have requested to regenerate the certificate from SHA1 to SHA256.

 

We have not issued an SSL certificate for the SAP server; it appears to have been generated by default during the server setup

 

I have a few questions regarding this matter

 

  1. The client does not use any web services at all, so we would like to inquire if the SSL certificate affects SAP.(The client's IT manager believes that the SSL certificate is applied even during regular SQL access. Currently, we are accessing the SQL server using SQL server authentication (sa account). We would like to confirm if the SSL certificate affects SQL access in this case as well)

 

  1. If you have any manuals or guides on updating the SSL certificate for the SAP B1 server, please provide them

 

  1. We would also like to inquire if there are any restrictions on the applicable SSL certifications for different versions of SAP

 

Thank you !!

entry.title: Re: How to calculate % in SAC Dashboard
entry.content:
Hi @N1kh1l ,

Does this mean I need to create a formula for every head in my story (there are 15+ heads)? Additionally, each head has multiple GL accounts under it, forming a hierarchy. How can the formula be calculated at the lower levels of this hierarchy?

Regards,
Tanya

entry.title: Re: Lead with Resilience
entry.content: Thanks for sharing and I am confident that Lead with Resilience would be a game changer for budding career aspirants. Is this course limited to certain audience or is open for SAP Community?

entry.title: Re: Error in ABAP CDS View for annotation @Analytics.query: true
entry.content: Hi, I have created a cube view also but still facing the issue, Is there any extra annotation required?

entry.title: Re: ABAP objects not editable
entry.content: It appears that you may not have the required service activated to perform that action. First, navigate to /N/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and check for the MIG_MC_ODATA_SRV service. If it is not activated, please activate it. That should resolve the issue.

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Email- Notification to T-code WLF_IDOC(IDoc Monitoring) in S/4 for error record
entry.content:
Hello, 

Finally we found out the solution. We have created a shared distribution list with SO23 transaction, then we used this list with SM36 and program of WLF_IDOC.

Kind regards

entry.title: Customizing Fiori app navigation in BAS
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement where we need to navigate to a customized object page from List report page.

I tried giving std sematic object and action of object page and provided customized app id in target mapping but still it navigates to standard object page. we are using BAS and we have only manifest-appdescr-variant file.

Can anyone help on how we can achieve the navigation from list report page to customized object page? is there anyway to override the standard navigation ?

Thanks,

entry.title: in order with multiple items is it possible to change UNIT DELIVEY NOTE for U to N with one action ?
entry.content: in order with multiple items is it possible to change "UNIT DELIVEY NOTE" for U to N with one quick action for all items ?

entry.title: Re: S/4Hana Cloud - Cloud Appliance Library
entry.content: Hello Arthur, SAP CAL only contains on-premise solutions (although they are offered "cloud-like"). The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is a true SaaS solution and therefore not contained in CAL. If you would like to try it out, please see https://www.sap.com/products/erp/s4hana/trial.html. Best Joerg

entry.title: Re: Why do we need Allowance concept ?
entry.content:
Hello 

the allowance logic allows to set up some pricing rules with a life cycle shorter than the contract one. You can uncorrelate the allowance logic to the contract logic. 

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Re: Help with formula
entry.content:
Hmm, well you can put the softtabs in a scroll view and the user can then see all the tabs by scrolling, but I don't see a way of putting Today in the middle. You can use the Layout > Position property to reposition Today to the middle of the visible area, but then you'd have to create your own scrolling capability (not really scrolling more like moving).

You could simply start with yesterday, today and tomorrow and add a previous button and a later button to, for example, remove the last item and add a new item to the end of the list. This would be pretty easy to do.

As far as I know the position of the scrollview is not retrievable and there is no property to set the position of the scroolview.

entry.title: Re: cds view excluding lines with a selection NOT IN anot...
entry.content:
In fact the information is available directly in a field :

PRPS.STUFE

Answered.

G.

BR

entry.title: Re: Table Storing User-Specific Settings for SPRO Display
entry.content:
Hello,

have a look into function module SPROJECT_GET_PARAMETERS. The parameters are stored like the "usual" user parameters visible in SU3. In the function module you will find some conversions between SU3 parameter 'PRO_01', 'PRO_02'... and their equivalents in the dialog window for the settings in SPRO. 

So, the answer is: table USR05.

Kind regards

Jens

entry.title: BearingPoint releases SAP Signavio Value Accelerator that optimizes payments for Premium Collections
entry.content:
The insurance sector is one of the world's largest, most diversified, and challenging markets. It is a highly regulated industry where frequent changes in legislation call for high levels of adaptability. Fraud risk detection and prevention, together with cybersecurity threats, demand important technological upgrades. Growing customers’ expectations for more personalized services are leading to a digital revolution with companies looking to establish more agile, customer-centric business models.

SAP Signavio and long-standing partner BearingPoint are equipped to provide insurance companies with the solutions and expertise they need to navigate modern challenges and successfully drive their digital initiatives. Importantly, we teamed up to generate ready to run sets of content – value accelerators – that can help companies further speed up their transformation programs while increasing the quality of outcomes.

The initiative has led to the recent release by BearingPoint of a new value accelerator for SAP Signavio Process Intelligence that supports a core and high impact process for insurers: the optimization of payments for Premium Collections in SAP Collections and Disbursements for Insurance.

I had the pleasure of connecting with Carsten Erler, Partner at BearingPoint to gain additional insights on the new value accelerator and discuss the next steps of our joint content strategy. In this blog, I share my findings.

We are proud to have you as a contributing partner to our value accelerator strategy; how do you think our content and value accelerators can benefit the insurance sector?

Carsten Erler: The concept of digital transformation in the insurance space came into play several years ago and it is persisting. Given the recent changes in the market, insurance companies need to adapt fast and innovate not to be left behind. The starting question is: “How do I get my business to be smarter, faster and more efficient?” Value accelerators provide insurance organizations with inspiration, foundational templates, and technical enablers to start and speed up their transformation journey throughout.  

Can you explain to the community what the new value accelerator is about and why this represents exciting news for the insurance industry?

Carsten Erler: Together with SAP Signavio we have decided to combine our strong sector, process, and technical expertise to develop a value accelerator that helps insurance companies move forward by getting direct and easily insights into their processes and gain transparency.

This new value accelerator serves companies working in the insurance industry and running on SAP Collections and Disbursements for Insurance. Designed for SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, the accelerator helps jump start the mining experience, leading to greater process transparency and efficiency. The value accelerator enables a fast and easy connection with SAP Collections and Disbursements to leverage potential in the collections and disbursement process chain with minimal effort. Process insights, especially in manual processes, are visible and measurable from day one.

Which challenges does the value accelerator help to solve?

Carsten Erler:  When we dive deeper into the processes of the collections and disbursements, we observe different bottlenecks and challenges our clients face which eventually lead to a less positive customer experience, or increased internal costs (processing, labor etc.). Many insurance organizations want to improve the process but do not have the time, budget, or resources to invest in this side project and this is where we come to help.

The new value accelerator supports insurance companies in identifying bottlenecks in their daily operations and obtain measurable benefits which result from process automation or reduced error rates. It also provides an overview of the most important dunning KPIs (e.g. top ten business partners with open items​, overview of premium contracts with open Items, overview of dunned statuses and more​).  By helping insurers understand what happens in the background, how the actual processes are compared to how they wish them to be, the value accelerator can enable benefits such as cost reduction, higher operational efficiency, and increased employee and customer satisfaction.

Which specific use cases does the value accelerator support?

Carsten Erler: The accelerator supports the collections and disbursements and has a starting point in the dunning process, the collection of overdue payments from customers. Furthermore, the accelerator can also analyze other processes, depending on the clients' strategies and needs.

Starting from the ‘dunning use case’ in SAP Collections and Disbursements, insurance companies can understand the created customer value through deep knowledge of the payment status, dunning, and settlement. End customers ask for personalized experiences, and these can be made possible by providing them with better services, such as issuing a dunning notice at the right moment with a suitable (modern) payment offer. The setup of the dashboards gives the finance departments a good overview of the liquidity for the specific time frame, the calculation of DSO (Days Sales Outstanding) is one click away, and the same for the overview of dunning vs. settled postings or the dunning in external collections. 

The as-is vs to-be scenarios can easily be compared to one another without the need to invest an additional project budget. Often the start is more challenging for companies, but the accelerator provides the support needed to quick-start process optimization.

And the journey does not stop here. The accelerator is not only useful for the dunning processes but for the entire SAP Collections and Disbursements environment. Considering this, adaptations pursuing the goal of being more adaptive to customer needs are easily possible. Once we improve the potential in the actual process, we can cut complexity and export the improved process as BPMN. Moreover, data-driven process mining shows the process steps where approaches including AI solutions truly leverage value.

What kind of delivery timelines should customers anticipate?

Carsten Erler: The first insights can be gained within hours after connecting to the SAP Collections and Disbursements for Insurance system and conclusions are derived in a matter of days. The prioritization of action items is based on process-relevant data and supported by BearingPoint's most experienced consultant teams. Major business cases and the implementation plan are set up within 2-3 weeks.

Where and when will the new accelerator be made available?

Carsten Erler: The value accelerator is now available. In order to request it, you can reach out to us via email at signavio@bearingpoint.com or via the value accelerator library for SAP Signavio solutions embedded into the SAP Signavio Process Transformation suite.

What is coming next?

Carsten Erler: As a next step, we are going to connect the ICM (Commissions) processes. Stay Tuned for more!

 

Thank you for reading about BearingPoint's exciting new SAP Signavio Value Accelerator. We're eager to continue the conversation and hear your thoughts and questions. Let's continue to drive innovation and transformation together!

entry.title: F110 Aggregation of open items after editing proposal
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have set up recipient settlement with the supplier. The functionality is generally working correctly. When I generate a payment proposal, all documents are aggregated and included in one payment - this is functioning correctly.

If a document is blocked for payment, the position will not be paid.
We can see that the recipient and supplier positions have been properly offset.
344.69 - 54,339.00 - 2,208.34 = -56,202.65."

In such a situation, the user who is processing the payment enters the payment proposal editing mode and has the ability to remove the block.

HERE MY PROBLEM ARISES

Edited supplier positions from which the block has been removed automatically enter the payment. Unfortunately, the recipient document, which was not blocked, needs to be manually assigned to the payment.

Since we have implemented more precise control and block more positions during the proposal generation, the work takes longer, and there are often multiple recipient invoices that require assignment. Only after the assignment is done, the positions are linked together.

Is it possible to automatically aggregate these positions after removing the block, in order to avoid manual assignment?

AFTER REMOVING THE BLOCK

MANUAL ASSIGNING THE RECIPIENT DOCUMENT

Thank you for all your answers.

Best regards,

Michal

entry.title: Copy results from lot with Insp. Type 03 to the lot with Insp. type 04.
entry.content:
I am trying to copy inspection result from lot with insp. type 03 to the lot with insp. type 04, Please suggest how can I use this selection procedure here on s4hana public cloud as user exit is not available here in public cloud, As per SAP replied "300– Custom selection of inspection lot" selection procedure is not available in S4hana public cloud.

Can you please let me know how can I achieved it s4hana public cloud ??????

entry.title: 回复： SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I am from China，currently living in Jiaxing，it is about 2 hours from Shanghai.

I was born in a city of ancient and has a history over 5000 years until now.

I came here for studying more SAP technology knowledge and sharing my feelings and experiences.

I am very interested in EWM product component.

Ken

entry.title: Re: change log in Manage Purchase Contracts
entry.content:
Hi,

You can see the change log of contracts in Display Purchase Contract(ME33K) webgui tile.

Or you can also use the App Display Change Documents.

Best Regards and Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Ariba Sourcing Master Data - Payload Request Successful but no data in Master Data Search
entry.content: Hi All, We are facing same issue as above we could see the data in transaction tracker & in Ariba Administration Master Payload Request the Status "Scheduled" since long time. Can anyone help me out why the payload got stuck in Schedule Stage.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Planning Area extension for SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Thank you Sarau - I didn't spot that one on the roadmap, that's great news.

entry.title: Re: can inspection lot results be carried to other plant...
entry.content:
Check your Customizing  for combination of movement type (e.g. 101/311) + Movement Indicator B [purchase order] + Receipt indicator X [STO]. Look for value of inspection lot origin (Table T156S, View V_T156SC_OIA)

(In some case a 101 movement code for GR would not create inspection lot when a 311, would.)

entry.title: Re: FMS Item Code from OITM UDF in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
Do I understand correctly that you enter Catalogue number in UDF, and you want the system to pull Item Code based on that number? Why not simply use standard SAP catalogue numbers? It will surely work faster.

The query seems fine at first glance, other than you missed T0 after OITM (should be FROM OITM T0). It shouldn't lose value after tab.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration - CSV Import in Value Mapping
entry.content: We have some target values in valuemapping containing a komma ',' as a character. Is there away to escape the komma in the value in the csv?

entry.title: Re: pay components deleted in manage pending hires reappe...
entry.content:
@Ssindhuja @nlgro023 

Hi I am atsu.

I have encountered the same problem that deleting pay component from initiator or inflight change during workflow does not affect and reappear pay component that aleady deleted after approving workflow.

Do you have any reason and solution to resolve it?

thank you as always.

entry.title: No company found contact your system administrator
entry.content:
Dear All,
I did setup SAP Cloud on premise, Cloud Control Center for SAPB1 Version 1.10 SP00 PL17 and SAP B1 version 10 FP2111 , all the while it is running ok, until today it start give problem.
When I login SAP B1, it prompt an error (No company found; contact your system administrator).
I found out, this issue will be solved after i restart SAP Business One SLD Service, but it is only work for 10 minutes. After that, if try login again, it will prompt the same error again, and if restart the SLD service again, its work  again. 

I suspect the SLD may be got problem, so I upgrade to Cloud Control Center for SAPB1 Version 1.10 SP00 PL18, but still the same error appear, and i need to restart every 10 minutes to allow users login SAP hosted on SAP Cloud.

Seek any help or advice, what should I check for this type of problem.

Thanks in advanced.

Kind regards,
Mat

entry.title: Re: FMS Item Code from OITM UDF in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
Hi @kedalenechong ,

If I got that right, you're trying to trigger an FMS in the ItemCode field based on a UDF previously populated. I suppose this is not achievable as the Item No. (ItemCode) is the Primary Key of any document at the line level, which means that the first data to pass to a line must be the Item No.

Any field you fill in before informing the Item Code will be cleaned out once the PK is passed.

I hope it makes sense.

Regards,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Split Batch Validation on VL31N/VL32N
entry.content:
Hello @jackyhjj_sn 

You can implement any delivery validations with delivery user-exits as documented with the note 415716 - User exits in delivery processing Alternatively you can use the BAdI enhancement LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC.

The message "Specified quantity is greater than the open quantity" is VL287. It is always sent as an information message and can't be customized - include FV50PF0P_POS_GEN_AENDERN_2, form routine position_generiert_aendern_2, line 411:

    IF lo_menge < 0 AND v50agl-chargenfindung IS INITIAL.
*******************************************
*     ARun handling in Delivery document  *
*******************************************
      PERFORM arun_batch_split_validation IN PROGRAM arun_routines_obd IF FOUND
              USING go_arun_obd_process xlips xlips[] lips lo_menge v50agl-chargenfindung
                    v50agl-dialog t180-trtyp xlikp.
*----ARun handling in Delivery documents---*
      save_287_menge = save_287_menge + lo_menge.
      save_287_menge_flo = save_287_menge_flo + local_float.
      lo_menge = 0.
      local_float = 0.
      IF gs_lips_batch-called_by = char2.                   "v_n_1236368
        gs_lips_batch-lgmng = 0.
        gs_lips_batch-lgmng_flo = 0.
      ENDIF.                                                "^_n_1236368
      MESSAGE i287.
    ENDIF.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: BTM TMS Transports - SLP_CTS: Error during client creation: Unauthorized
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We've configured TMS to transport iflows between out two environments, but we're stuck with the end phase of the process. When we want to import the component to the destination account we have the next error:

Exception during start of deployment for deploy type 'SLP_CTS': Error during client creation: Unauthorized

The corresponding target destination is created according with the documentation, the url is

https://deploy-service.cfapps.<your DC>.hana.ondemand.com/slprot/<org name on DEV subaccount>/<DEV space name>/slp

The user informed in the destination has the space developer role in the space we want to transport.

Could you give us any clue about the problem?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Depreciation key for Austria - half year depreciation
entry.content:
Dear all,

can anybody tell which depreciation key can be used for Local Gaap Austria (half year depreciation) 

Example:

Acquisition date 3.3. - depreciation beginns 1.1.

Acquisition date 11.11. - depreciation beginns 1.7

In Public Cloud LINS is used in standard which is wrong to me! 

kR

entry.title: Re: Practical introduction to SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
entry.content:
Hi Erik, 

They are examples. The real ones have a lot more dimensions in the strings passed to TO_REAL_VECTOR, 300 numbers to be exact. I've removed to simplify the example (please note the ellipsis on the examples)

TO_REAL_VECTOR('[0.005068,-0.023730,-0.062008,-0.053183, ...

 Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Killer Cycle
entry.content:
@Sandra_Solis wrote:

... I forgot to comment out a debugging loop I used to check if everything was okay.

Feeling confident, I asked the client to transport the program to PRD. As soon as they executed the job, it started consuming all the system memory until the entire system collapsed...

How did that happen though?

  • The amount of memory allocated to a thread is less than the total memory available. 
  • A debugging loop usually doesn't contain any executable code, so why was all the memory consumed.
  • And why didn't the issue show up in testing?

I'm not doubting you. I'm just puzzled.

entry.title: 如何使用SOAP调用创建同步日记账分录？
Re: Application set-up and basic understanding of DDMRP designed for SAP S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content: how can i activate this or i don't need to use it to show results ?

entry.title: Re: How to Generate a formatted excel in background and send it as an email using ixml method
entry.content:
Or you could just use abap2xlsx

https://github.com/abap2xlsx/abap2xlsx

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam HANA ML In 's-Hertogenbosch 2024-06 Recap
entry.content:
I have 2 questions left

  1. What is the similarity between SAP, HANA and the Titanic
  2. Was our host Vitaliy the Jedi Master and we his padawans? Or was it the other way around?

Listen to this episode to find out.

📺 https://youtu.be/Qm9zEeX6J88?si=XV5FoCvwkDUg6xnX

entry.title: What's New with SAP Datasphere in Q2, 2024?
entry.content:
💫Join the SAP Datasphere product management team for the session and get the latest information about features and functions delivered in Q2 2024. You can ask the product experts in the Q&A section live during the session and will get an overview on the upcoming features planned for 2024.

The session will cover the following topics:
👉 General product updates
👉 Updates in data integration
👉 Updates in data modeling, catalog and consumption
👉 Updates in administration and security
👉 Updates on business content and SAP BW bridge
👉 Outlook

We look forward to seeing you!!

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 3 - Image Embed
entry.content:
Hello,

Here is my submission:

entry.title: Re: SAP-VAT CODE-PURCHASE REQUEST
entry.content:
Hi @diego76 ,

Do you have any Tax Code Determination rule covering this scenario? You can either default the tax code in your Supplier BP, as already answered here, or create a more specific rule in the Tax Code Determination. Both should trigger the Tax Code in the PR.

Regards,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: SAP script error checking
entry.content:
Hi Paul!

I think your question doesn't relate to SAP Emarsys Scripting Language (ESL). ESL is used for creating dynamic personalized content in marketing campaigns in Emarsys. Please double check the Tags and assign the relevant one so that an other subject matter expert can help you with an answer. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Split Batch Validation on VL31N/VL32N
entry.content:
Hi @raymond_giuseppi , thanks for your prompt reply.
we are not using those config, as per our understanding, those configs is the tolerance for PO Qty with Delivery Qty.
But in my case, we want to validate the amount of initial delivery quantity with the total of the split batch quantity.

entry.title: Re: Errors when posting in program RLLI2100
entry.content: hey, I'm too getting same error in EHP8 system in ZG51 TCODE . How did you solve this?

entry.title: Missing permission to cancel Time Payout
entry.content:
Hello experts

I have configured the process of Time Account Payout. Everything is working okay, with the request being made, a workflow being triggered and approved. The problem is that, if for some reason, the employee wants to cancel a request (approved or not) he/she gets an error message saying 'No permission to correct object'. 

 

What are the permissions that I need to add to make this possible? 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Buttons missing in edocument cockpit
entry.content:
That the colleague said and also can help you to understand that is explained in 2530509 - Electronic Document Processing Framework Troubleshooting Guide:

D30 - Missing 'submit' and/or 'send to customer' buttons in the cockpit or error 'Action SUBMIT is not allowed for country/region': to solve this refer to SAP Help documentation Activation Requirements for Features in SAP Document and Reporting Compliance and activate the business function based upon the licensing you have.

D31 - In one system, the advanced feature buttons(SUBMIT, STATUS etc.) are appearing in edoc_cockpit without activating any business function but it is not appearing in other systems: We have unblocked advanced features for countries/processes which are already productive by inserting system generated entries in EDODCUSAGE table but for new ones, it is mandatory to activate business function based upon your licensing (Refer topic D30).

entry.title: Re: Hide Inactive Banks
entry.content:
Hi @maria_cuevas ,

Sorry, It is not clear to me what you want to achieve. Could you please supply us with more details? A few screenshots would be helpful as well.

We have Bank Accounts, House Bank Accounts, and Bank G/L Accounts. At least within the UK localization, only the latter can be set up as inactive.

Regards,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Import SAP BW users in SAC using SAP IPS
entry.content:
Thanks, looks solid.

There is another blog going in this direction as well: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-replicating-bw-analysis-authorizations-into-dimension/ba-p/13521361

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 10 why items weight and size are mandatory?
entry.content:
Hi @patrice_vigier ,

Could you please supply a few screenshots of the message you get when trying it?

I can't think of any settings to make these fields mandatory.

Regards,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: Cloud Connector License Refresh
entry.content:
Indeed, the Cloud Connector does not require any license!!

So this article is quite confusing.

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP Build apps trail version with the S/4 hana system
entry.content: The error message tells it. You have not set up a Cloud Connector between BTP Destination and on-premise S/4. Without it, BTP cannot access your private SAP network.

entry.title: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #14
entry.content:
👉 The call for contributions for one of the upcoming roundtables is open! 

 

If you want to show a demo or share a use case scenario for SAP BTP ABAP Environment send us an email and we will get back to you.
 

Introduction

 

As SAP BTP ABAP environment (aka Steampunk) and ABAP Cloud became more and more popular inside and outside of SAP, there is a high demand for rolling out the latest product news and updates, asking questions, and of course showing demos. 

💡 If you weren’t able to join one of our previous roundtables, you can find the slides presented, recordings, and further references in this GitHub repository.


Meeting Information

When:                                                                      
  • July 30th, 10:00 - 11:00 AM CET  – Zoom Meeting (please register in advance) 
 
Who:
  • All interested customers, partners, and stakeholders are invited to join and exchange ideas and feedback with others and the product team
  • Steampunk team: Frank Jentsch (Product Lead for SAP BTP ABAP Environment), Daniela Fenderl, Chris Swanepoel, Iwona Hahn & Burcu Karlidag 

Preliminary Agenda:
  • Product news and outlook
  • Hello, ABAP Cloud! Landing Page
  • Q&A
Looking forward to meeting you!
 


Check out our SAP Business Technology ABAP Environment page in SAP Community for product updates and upcoming events.

entry.title: Wron application startet
entry.content:
Hello

I have the problem that I have selected several documents via CV04N. Now I double-click on a document info record and the originals are displayed.
If I double-click on the pdf again, I get an error message that the document type does not exist and there is no corresponding application.
However, the document type and application exist.
What could be the reason for this?

BR Uli

entry.title: Why is enterprise structure set for both position (infotype 8) and employee (infotype 2)?
entry.content: I wonder if storing enterprise structure data in infotype 2 of pa30 is not redundant. I mean an employee will always hold a position and the postion has this information stored in infotype 8 of po13.

entry.title: Re: Award Multiple quotations for RFQ
entry.content: Today the same question also comes to my mind although I have created the situation multiple times. Just want to know more of the business intention behind this. And I have found the note 3377607.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content:
Hi @Avinesh_Sundar 
Nice to meet you! 
Please post your question regarding regarding to share resources for SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 and SAP Datasphere in our SAP Learning Q&A. 
This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
Would you mind to repost it ?

Kind regards
Margit

Kind regards

Margit

entry.title: Re: Hybrid Testing w/ Postgres issue

Hello

I am currently encountering the same topic. Please reach out if you were to find something!

 

Thank you!

 

Kind regards

Brecht

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 3 - Image Embed
entry.content: So, what were the next entries on the list of similarities for Lola, and with what similarity scores?

entry.title: I can`t Post Goods receipt
entry.content:
親愛なる友人、

「購買伝票の入庫転記アプリ」（TDD環境）で入庫転記をしたいのですが、すでに 
購買発注登録が完了しています。
次のエラーが表示されます

■勘定52041000には原価計算に関連する勘定割当が必要です

しかし、アカウント52041000は使用しておらず 、原価計算の入力フィールドがありません。
このエラーを解決する方法を教えてください。

よろしくお願いします。

#S/4 HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: Company logo not visible on Enable Now Template Custo...
entry.content: Thanks Dirk for your reply! I figured the problem was: the logo should comply to the following size

entry.title: 回复： SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Welcome @KenWang - perhaps you've already joined the Shanghai group here on SAP Community? I would also recommend that you subscribe to the managed tags for the SAP EWM related topics.

entry.title: Re: Branded MDK Client Android apk size
entry.content:
<application
    android:extractNativeLibs="true"
In AndroidManifest.xml set extractNativeLibs to true and then generate build.

entry.title: Display illustrated message in list report page if the list is empty
entry.content:
I have a fiori elements application with list page and object page. I am using cds annotations to display the fields

If there are no rows to be displayed in the list report I want to show an illustrated message of no data. Is this possible? If this is possible how can we achieve this?

entry.title: Re: Rest Rule Period configuration
entry.content:
I don´t think that you can expect that someone copy and paste his work here. I think you need to do a bit on your own.

What to do to create rest rules is step-by-step explained in the time tracking documentation.

You can find also some examples in our best practice content delivery - I think the rest rules are included for Germany for example.

Best regards

Volker

entry.title: Automatic email sent to the customer informing them about the date for the next intervention
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'am new on SAP FSM and i'am trying to learn the basics, so i had a task to create a business rule that allow to sent an automatic email to the customer informing them about the date for the next intervention with condition: as soon as activity is released, send the customer the date and time of technician's intervention.

could any one help me to to create business rule for this task?
thank you

entry.title: Re: NWBC 8 SAP Business Client 8 - how to disable headers ?
entry.content:
Hi,

if the settings you are looking for are the following:

ShowGuiCaption and EnableQuickLaunch

you could set them to false in your configuration file:

ShowGuiCaption and EnableQuickLaunch

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_CLIENT/f526c7c14c074e7b9d18c4fd0c88c593/7d5ee8343d91495a8d3bf6ed8d19ac63.html?q=option%20file

Regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content: @thomaswiegand Thanks a lot for your suggestions @Ulrich_Schmidt Thanks a lot for guiding me in the right direction and your solution.

entry.title: SWEC filter restrictions - filter for adding new item to/deleting item from Sales order
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have done all the customization for triggering events using SAP NetWeaver event enablement Ad-on. The events are now getting triggered for Sales order creation and sales order change.

The events however need to be triggered based on certain conditions. I had two other questions regarding SWEC field restrictions for event trigger.

  1. I want the sales order change to get triggered under multiple conditions. One of them is when there is new item added or when an item id deleted from the sales order. I am unable to find a way to add this condition into SWEC.
  2. There is also a custom field in VBAK (ZZPB) which needs to be checked and the event should be triggered only when this custom field has specific values. 

So, I have put the conditions as below in SWEC

(&VBAK_ZZPB_NEW& = SO-MTS OR &VBAK_ZZPB_NEW& = SO-MTO)

AND

(&VBAK_VDATU_OLD& NE &VBAK_VDATU_NEW& OR

&VBAP_ZMENG_OLD& NE &VBAP_ZMENG_NEW& OR

&VBEP_EDATU_OLD& NE &VBEP_EDATU_NEW& OR

&VBEP_LDDAT_OLD& NE &VBEP_LDDAT_NEW& OR

&VBEP_MBDAT_OLD& NE &VBEP_MBDAT_NEW& OR

&VBEP_TDDAT_OLD& NE &VBEP_TDDAT_NEW& OR

(&VBPA_PARVW_OLD& = SH AND &VBPA_PARNR_OLD& NE &VBPA_PARNR_NEW&)

)

This condition works only if I take off the VBAK-ZZPB conditions. Once the VBAK-ZZPB condition is added, the conditional triggering ceases to work. Any ideas on how to resolve this.

 

Your inputs are highly appreciated!

Thanks,

Smohan

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content: To find out, where exactly the accidental switch from https/443 to http/80 is happening, we would need to look at the logs of the Connectivity Agent (and perhaps also the logs of the HTTP Client used by the application).

entry.title: Insights SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics
entry.content:
A key benefit of SAP S/4HANA is the users’ ability to access real-time information to support decisions, directly in the Cloud ERP business processes. In this session, we will cover the Embedded Analytics that are available, and discuss strategies towards successful implementation.

Speaker: Jey Ping, Executive Advisor, SAP S/4HANA, SAP America 

Registration link: https://events.sap.com/transformation/en/home#240718
